---
title: "data: Misclassification and Missed Comorbidity Matrices (Figure Data)"
author: "Till Julius Adam"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(writexl)
```

```{r load-data}
data <- read_excel("data_simulated.xlsx")
data <- data[data$ExamType == 1, ]
factor_cols <- c( "sex", "race", "AdoptedPatient", "Siblings", "Family_History_Any", "Smoking", "Antipsychotic_discharge", "Antidepressant_discharge", "Mood_Stabilizer_discharge", "Anxiolytic_Hypnotic_discharge", "Stimulant_discharge", "R_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder", "R_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder", "R_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder", "R_DepressiveDisorder", "R_AnxietyDisorder", "R_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders", "R_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder", "R_FeedingAndEatingDisorders", "R_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders", "R_SubstanceAbuse", "R_PersonalityDisorder", "Ch_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder", "Ch_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder", "Ch_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder", "Ch_DepressiveDisorder", "Ch_AnxietyDisorder", "Ch_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders", "Ch_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder", "Ch_FeedingAndEatingDisorders", "Ch_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders", "Ch_SubstanceAbuse", "Ch_PersonalityDisorder" )
data[factor_cols] <- lapply(data[factor_cols], as.factor)
```

```{r misclassification-matrices}
disorders <- c("AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder", "SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder",
               "BipolarAndRelatedDisorder", "DepressiveDisorder", "AnxietyDisorder",
               "ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders", "TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder",
               "FeedingAndEatingDisorders", "DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders",
               "SubstanceAbuse", "PersonalityDisorder")

n <- length(disorders)
true_confusion <- comorbid_miss <- matrix(0, n, n, dimnames = list(disorders, disorders))

for (i in seq_len(n)) {
  for (j in seq_len(n)) {
    if (i == j) next
    R_A <- data[[paste0("R_", disorders[i])]]
    R_B <- data[[paste0("R_", disorders[j])]]
    Ch_A <- data[[paste0("Ch_", disorders[i])]]
    Ch_B <- data[[paste0("Ch_", disorders[j])]]

    true_confusion[i, j] <- sum(R_A == 1 & R_B == 0 & Ch_A == 0 & Ch_B == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    comorbid_miss[i, j] <- sum(R_A == 1 & R_B == 1 & Ch_A == 0 & Ch_B == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}
```

```{r misclassification-test}
# Exact binomial test: observed misclassification vs. expected under base rate (one-sided)
N_total <- nrow(data)
base_rate_results <- data.frame()

for (i in seq_along(disorders)) {
  for (j in seq_along(disorders)) {
    if (i == j) next

    observed <- true_confusion[i, j]
    R_A <- data[[paste0("R_", disorders[i])]]
    R_B <- data[[paste0("R_", disorders[j])]]
    Ch_A <- data[[paste0("Ch_", disorders[i])]]
    Ch_B <- data[[paste0("Ch_", disorders[j])]]

    n_at_risk <- sum(R_A == 1 & R_B == 0 & Ch_A == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    base_rate <- mean(Ch_B == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

    if (n_at_risk > 0 & base_rate > 0) {
      test <- binom.test(observed, n_at_risk, p = base_rate, alternative = "greater")
      base_rate_results <- rbind(base_rate_results, data.frame(
        True_Dx = disorders[i],
        Mistaken_For = disorders[j],
        Observed = observed,
        N_at_risk = n_at_risk,
        Base_rate = round(base_rate, 2),
        Expected = round(n_at_risk * base_rate, 2),
        p = round(test$p.value, 4)
      ))
    }
  }
}
base_rate_results$p_adj <- round(p.adjust(base_rate_results$p, method = "BH"), 4)
```

```{r missed-comorbidity-test}
# Binomial test with null p=0.5: one-sided test for systematic missed comorbidity asymmetry
asymmetry_results <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:(n-1)) {
  for (j in (i+1):n) {
    a_by_b <- comorbid_miss[i, j]  # A missed when B caught
    b_by_a <- comorbid_miss[j, i]  # B missed when A caught
    total <- a_by_b + b_by_a

    if (total > 0) {
      dominant_count <- max(a_by_b, b_by_a)
      test <- binom.test(dominant_count, total, p = 0.5, alternative = "greater")
      asymmetry_results <- rbind(asymmetry_results, data.frame(
        Disorder_A = disorders[i],
        Disorder_B = disorders[j],
        A_missed_B_caught = a_by_b,
        B_missed_A_caught = b_by_a,
        Dominant = ifelse(a_by_b > b_by_a, "B overshadows A",
                         ifelse(b_by_a > a_by_b, "A overshadows B", "Neither")),
        p = round(test$p.value, 4)
      ))
    }
  }
}
asymmetry_results$p_adj <- round(p.adjust(asymmetry_results$p, method = "BH"), 4)
```

```{r export}
# Export formatted matrices as Excel tables
export_matrix <- function(mat, N) {
  df <- as.data.frame(mat)
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    ifelse(x == 0, "0 (0.0)", paste0(x, " (", format(round(x / N * 100, 1), nsmall = 1), ")"))
  })
  colnames(df) <- paste0("Ch_", colnames(df))
  df <- cbind(`R_Disorder` = rownames(mat), df)
  rownames(df) <- NULL
  df
}

write_xlsx(export_matrix(true_confusion, N_total), "Table_4a_TrueConfusion_Matrix.xlsx")
write_xlsx(export_matrix(comorbid_miss, N_total), "Table_4b_ComorbidMiss_Matrix.xlsx")

# Export long-format CSVs for figure_heatmap.py
export_csv <- function(mat, stat_results, is_misclassification) {
  rows <- list()
  disorders_list <- rownames(mat)
  for (i in seq_along(disorders_list)) {
    for (j in seq_along(disorders_list)) {
      if (i == j) next
      count <- mat[i, j]
      pct <- round(count / N_total * 100, 2)

      if (is_misclassification) {
        match <- stat_results[stat_results$True_Dx == disorders_list[i] &
                              stat_results$Mistaken_For == disorders_list[j], ]
        p_val <- if (nrow(match) > 0) match$p[1] else NA
        p_fdr <- if (nrow(match) > 0) match$p_adj[1] else NA
      } else {
        # Missed comorbidity: tested as unique pairs (i < j), map both directions
        if (i < j) {
          match <- stat_results[stat_results$Disorder_A == disorders_list[i] &
                                stat_results$Disorder_B == disorders_list[j], ]
        } else {
          match <- stat_results[stat_results$Disorder_A == disorders_list[j] &
                                stat_results$Disorder_B == disorders_list[i], ]
        }
        p_val <- if (nrow(match) > 0) match$p[1] else NA
        p_fdr <- if (nrow(match) > 0) match$p_adj[1] else NA
      }

      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        row_disorder = disorders_list[i],
        col_disorder = disorders_list[j],
        n = count,
        pct = pct,
        p_value = p_val,
        p_fdr = p_fdr
      )
    }
  }
  do.call(rbind, rows)
}

# Write CSVs for figure_heatmap.py
write.csv(export_csv(true_confusion, base_rate_results, TRUE),
          "Figure_Data_Misclassification.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(export_csv(comorbid_miss, asymmetry_results, FALSE),
          "Figure_Data_MissedComorbidity.csv", row.names = FALSE)

true_confusion
comorbid_miss
```
